dominants.dominant_desc:
YSS Hero Tricks & Tips:
Passive Management: Alternate between melee and ranged attacks to maximize damage, as each switch provides two enhanced, high-damage basic attacks.
Skill 1 Immunity: Use Traceless (Skill 1) to dash, dealing damage, and gain 1 second of immunity to stun effects.
Fast Farming: Utilize the passive to clear jungle camps extremely fast. The enhanced attacks allow for efficient, high-speed farming.
Skill 2 Combo: Blood Floods (Skill 2) resets the passive. Use it to poke from a distance (hold) or to engage (tap), ensuring you capitalize on the weapon switch.
Ultimate Usage: Eunchen (Ultimate) provides map-wide vision of all enemies and allows you to finish off low-HP targets. It also triggers his passive, providing a movement speed boost.
Positioning: As a damage-focused assassin/marksman, enter team fights late as a cleaner rather than an initiator

hero.hero_overview: Yi Sun-shin (YSS) is a high-damage Marksman/Assassin jungler known for excellent map control, fast farming, and high-mobility sustained damage. He excels by switching between sword (melee) and bow (ranged) attacks to trigger critical hits, using his CC-immune dash (Skill 1) to escape or engage. His ultimate provides crucial global vision.
hero.hero_strength:
High Damage Output & Scaling: YSS has a unique passive that enhances his basic attacks when switching between his glaive (melee) and bow (ranged). This allows him to produce immense damage in the mid-to-late game, often outscaling traditional assassins.
CC Immunity (S1): His first skill, Traceless, allows him to dash forward while becoming immune to most control effects for 1 second. This is crucial for dodging stun abilities and escaping dangerous situations.
Fast Jungle Clear & Objective Control: YSS can clear jungle camps very quickly and can use his 2nd skill (Blood Floods) and ultimate to secure Turtle and Lord objectives, making him an excellent "hyper carry" jungler.
Global Map Vision (Ultimate): His ultimate, Mountain Shaker, reveals the position of all enemy heroes on the map, allowing for strategic decision-making, preventing ambushes, and assisting in picking off low-health enemies.
Mobility & Passive Proc: Switching weapons grants a 15% movement speed boost, helping him kite enemies or reposition during fights
hero.hero_weakness:
YSS is relatively weak in the first few minutes and can be vulnerable to invades, especially if his team does not provide support
High Skill Cap Maximizing YSS damage requires constant, rhythmic switching of weapons glaive bow glaive and precise movement to hit with enhanced attacks.
Susceptible to Burst/Lockdown: Although he has CC immunity on his 1st skill, he is still a squishy hero who can be killed instantly by high-burst assassins e g  Karina, Natalia or heavy lockdown if caught out of position 
Reliance on Retribution Team He often relies on his team for frontline support in early team fights

cooperates.cooperate_desc: She is the ultimate partner for YSS. Her ultimate, Heartguard, attaches to him during his aggressive dives, providing a shield, healing, and slow effects that make it easier for him to cycle his passive safely.
Tigreal offers massive area-of-effect (AoE) crowd control. By grouping enemies together, they create the perfect window for YSS to unleash his full burst damage and weapon-swapping combos.
There is a unique synergy between their ultimates. YSS provides global vision with Mountain Shocker, allowing Chip to precisely place portals for a coordinated team ambush.

counters.counter_desc: YSS is the ultimate counter to Natalia. His ultimate, Mountain Shocker, reveals her location anywhere on the map, completely negating her invisibility and making her vulnerable to his high-burst melee attacks.
YSS can easily track Hanzo's real body. When Hanzo uses his ultimate, YSS can cast his own ultimate to find exactly where the main body is hiding, allowing him to dive and eliminate Hanzo safely.

Since Barats is a relatively slow-moving frontline hero, YSS can easily "kite" him. By alternating between his bow and glaive, YSS can deal massive critical damage while staying just out of reach of Barats' close-range skills.

He is the worst hero to face. Helcurt's ultimate, Dark Night Falls, blinds Yi Sun-shin, preventing him from using his global vision. Additionally, Helcurt's silence and instant burst can kill Yi Sun-shin before he can even activate his first skill for immunity.

Lancelot's extreme mobility and multiple dashes make it very difficult for Yi Sun-shin to land his skills or maintain his weapon-swapping rhythm. A skilled Lancelot can dance around Yi Sun-shin and dodge his burst damage using immunity frames.

While not as burst-heavy as the others, Akai is "one to watch" because his Heavy Spin can pin YSS against a wall or push him out of a fight entirely. This disrupts YSS's positioning, which is critical for his survival and damage output.

dominants.dominant_desc:
This is the stage where Yi Sun-shin shines the most as he typically has three or four core items completed. Focus on the following strategies during this phase:

Objective Pressure: Use your superior farming speed to secure towers and steal enemy buffs whenever you see an opening.

Active Scouting: Constantly use your Ultimate (Mountain Shocker) to reveal enemy positions, especially when contesting the Lord or Turtle.

Selective Aggression: Engage in more team fights now that your burst damage is high enough to kill most heroes, but always look for opportunities to finish off low-HP enemies.

Map Awareness: Look for opportunities to power-farm in the opponent's jungle when your ultimate reveals they are on the opposite side of the map.
Start with the Blue Buff to manage early mana needs, then prioritize every available creep, including the Lithowanderer and Crabs, to out-level the enemy jungler.
His passive and low skill cooldowns allow him to clear the jungle faster than almost any other hero.
His ultimate reveals every enemy hero on the map, making it impossible for them to hide or set up ambushes.
His first skill, Traceless, provides a brief dash with a full second of CC immunity, allowing him to dodge lethal stuns and hooks.

emblems.emblem_desc: This emblem set utilize a combination of Thrill or Agility for early-game pressure and rotation speed, alongside Seasoned Hunter to drastically increase efficiency when securing the Lord and Turtle. When paired with the Killing Spree talent, which provides health restoration and a movement speed burst after every kill, Yi Sun-shin transforms into a relentless finisher capable of wiping out entire teams through reset potential and high-mobility dives.

equips.equip_desc: This build is designed to transform Yi Sun-shin into a high-mobility "hit-and-run" assassin by balancing raw power with survival utility to ensure he can carry from the early jungle phase to the late game. It begins with Tough Boots (Ice Retribution) to reduce crowd control duration and steal enemy movement speed, followed by War Axe for ramping physical penetration and cooldown reduction that thrives during his weapon-swapping cycles. Endless Battle is a mandatory core item that amplifies his burst with True Damage while providing necessary Lifesteal and Mana Regen, while Blade of Despair provides the massive flat attack needed to make his passive critical hits lethal. To ensure dominance in the late game, Malefic Roar provides the essential penetration to shred through high-armor targets, and Winter Crown serves as a vital survival tool, offering a "Frozen" active state to dodge burst damage or wait for skill resets during high-risk dives.

hero.hero_overview: Yi Sun-shin is a versatile Marksman/Assassin who excels in the Jungle. Unlike traditional marksmen, he alternates between a long-range bow and a short-range glaive.
hero.hero_strength: Because of his passive cooldown reduction, he can spam skills and clear jungle camps extremely efficiently.
hero.hero_weakness: While he has CC immunity, he is still a glass cannon. If caught by high-burst assassins before he can react, he can be taken down instantly.

data.recommend: Master the tactical rhythm and global dominance of Yi Sun-shin with this expert guide designed to elevate your hyper-carry gameplay to a professional level.

spell.spell_desc: Retribution is the essential Battle Spell for Yi Sun-shin (YSS) because it enables his primary role as a jungler. It is vital for his efficiency and effectiveness throughout the match.

data.title: Critical Strike King: How to Carry with Yi Sun-shin

hero.hero_overview:
With recent marksman buffs, the double marksman composition has returned to the meta, offering faster scaling and consistent damage, especially in objectives and extended fights.

The standard lineup—Roam, Mage, EXP, Marksman, and Assassin (Marksman)—provides strong lane pressure, crowd control, and sustained DPS across all game phases.

Instead of a pure assassin or utility jungler, teams should maximize the buff lane by selecting a marksman jungler to increase efficiency and overall damage output.

Yi Sun-Shin excels in this role due to his high mobility, burst damage, and global vision, allowing effective rotations, safer decision-making, and strong objective control, making him a versatile and reliable pick in the current patch.
hero.hero_strength: Yi Sun-Shin is a strong and versatile jungler in the current meta, benefiting from the double marksman buffs. As an assassin; marksman hybrid, he offers both burst damage and sustained DPS, making him effective in scaling and objective-focused teams. His form-switching grants high mobility for fast rotations and strong objective control, while his global ultimate provides vision and poke to control the map and set up fights. Overall, his damage, mobility, and vision make him a highly adaptable and reliable pick.
hero.hero_weakness:
Despite his strengths, Yi Sun-Shin has several weaknesses that can be exploited with proper drafting and gameplay. His effectiveness heavily depends on items and levels, making him vulnerable during the early game. If his jungle is invaded or his farming is disrupted, he struggles to reach his power spike and may fall behind in tempo.

Yi Sun-Shin is also mechanically demanding. His damage output relies on proper timing between melee and ranged stances. Mistakes in positioning or stance usage can significantly reduce his effectiveness in team fights. Unlike tanky junglers, he is relatively fragile, meaning he can be eliminated quickly if caught by crowd control.

Another major weakness is his susceptibility to hard crowd control and burst divers. Heroes with fast gap closers or lock-down abilities can prevent him from repositioning and dealing damage effectively. Once his mobility skills are on cooldown, Yi Sun-Shin becomes an easy target.

spell.spell_desc: Retribution is chosen to secure jungle objectives efficiently, providing faster jungle clear, reliable last-hitting on buffs, Turtle, and Lord, and enabling Yi Sun-Shin to scale safely and maintain objective control throughout the game.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Great mobility, but lack of frontline or extensive healing can be crucial.
Your solo carry games turn into duo carry games! It requires a little different play style but can work extremely well, especially in late game.

What happens if an extremely fast farming hero gets to farm even faster? Absolute carnage. Just remember to play safer in early because a support is weaker than a tank. Almost as good as Angela in late game.

Healing supports are preferable in SoloQ since unlike tanks it doesn't take a lot of brain capacity to play them well and they're stronger against uncoordinated teams.
Remember that in 5man the meta is different.

counters.counter_desc: This braindead hero can ruin your match from early to late game with a random hook or flicker ulti. Remember to build Immortality or prepare to quick sell. In SoloQ I prefer to ban him outright.
Another braindead hero, this time in jungle. Almost impossible to kill in late game, but make 1 mistake and he oneshots you. What were they thinking? Another great candidate for your ban slot.
She is extremely difficult to deal with, she WILL invade and your team WONT help you. Ask your team to ban her or pray she doesn't get picked.
Practically nullifies your objective presence. Forget about turtles and lords, but he can be easy to kill or shutdown from early game.

dominants.dominant_desc: I recommend starting from Blue buff every time, except for when you're afraid your Buff can be delayed/stolen(against Franco, Kaja, Novaria, Fanny, Natalia, Hanzo), then you have 3 possible rotations.
Take all the greens in your jungle immediately. No invades, take Litho only after 2 buffs if it's still up. After Lv.4 try to gank a lane or counter-initiate an enemy gank.
After Blue Buff, immediately go to enemy green near the Litho and try to steal it. YSS at level 2 in decently strong and has good retri. After the invade take Litho and continue to your Red Buff.

Risky strategy, but works frequently. Make use of your tempo and immediately take both of your buffs. If enemy jungler doesn't have quick clear(for ex. Alucard) you can invade enemy buff and take it, YSS retri is very good. After invading you will have Lv.4 which opens a possibility for a kill or a further invade. To consistently pull it off, you must have good knowledge of limits of your hero.

In SoloQ, it can be difficult to take the 1st Turtle. Even if your retri is good, I recommend exchanging turtle for one side of enemies jungle. This funnels gold and EXP to you, while turtle benefits the entire team, but has lower impact on the Jungler. I rarely take turtle if against heroes who can easily zone/shut down YSS (YZ, Lapu², Alice etc.). When invading, try to not use your retri since enemies can counter-invade after taking the Turtle.

If you're more than 2 levels ahead of enemy Jungler, you can be confident in taking the Turtle. Still, don't waste your s1 and be mindful of enemy CC/burst. Always assume enemy will use Flicker unless you 100% know they don't have it. In high ranks, people tend to 5 man group on later turtles, which opens more possibilities for trades. A T1 turret gives same gold as min 5 Turtle, and T2 turret gives same gold as min 7-8 Turtle. Sometimes even when you're ahead it might be more beneficial to funnel the gold and EXP on you rather than risk your life taking neutral objectives.

1st Lord isn't as important but still can give a massive advantage. Try to get him to charge into enemy's T3 turret and activate as many Holy Shields as possible. You prepare the enemy base for a stronger siege. Make the Lord go sidelane if possible, he is weaker in Mid Lane since he reaches enemy base quicker.

Don't all-in into the Lord unless you're 100% sure enemies will end the game with it. Remember, if enemies group up, it opens a lot of possibilities for farming/pushing. You can try to take a tower in exchange for the Lord. Using your ult, it's possible to sneakily burst enemies marching lord if they're far away.

This is when most of your games should end. At this point, if you do everything correctly you should have so much advantage and snowball, your presence can win any teamfight. Take risks to try to end quickly. Prepare your Quick Sell/Buy items. Capitalize on every advantage. Remember, after reaching full build you won't get stronger, only enemies will.
Same strategy. Put pressure on the map, try to splitpush, take turrets in exchange for the Lord. Contest only if you know you can win it of you know you can't defend it.

After 3 Lords, almost everyone will have full build. Prepare lanes before the objective, create pressure, go for solo kills or splitpush to make enemy panic recall. You should control the tempo of the game if you want to win.

This guide is not for complete beginners. It assumes you know the mechanics of your hero and you have decent battle IQ. It's not really difficult to play YSS but if you feel like youre lacking try to read the info and fill the gaps. 70% WR in soloQ is completely possible. I reached top 1 global YSS with 82% WR(11900 MMR) on him playing mostly solo.

Always look at the minimap. When clearing jungle, when pushing, even in teamfights. Consider looking at the map as breathing in MLBB. Gank if you see enemy overextending, prepare for an ambush if enemies are missing for a prolonged time, invade if you see enemy heroes busy ganking. Don't be surprised when enemy EXP Laner shows up at the other side of the map. You should've checked the minimap. Take every advantage that you can take. You never know when the game will turn around either way.

In teamfights, I tend to divide heroes into those who can be easily killed without your boat and those who are not. This doesn't really change with the meta. For example, Aurora or Joy can easily be taken down without your ulti, but Karina or Moskov are difficult to kill if you don't have a stun. Don't waste your boat on someone unimportant. Try to show on enemy's minimap for as little time as possible, always try to flank or find a kill angle. You are very agile and can escape almost any situation if you know the limits well. Take calculated risks.

emblems.emblem_desc: All-rounder emblem. Fast farming, good survivability, can create clutch moments
More late-game focused emblem. Weapon master sacrifices a bit of tempo in exchange for better late-game and synergy with Floryn's flower.

Build Sky Piercer before finishing Hunter Strike right after Fury Hammer. Useful if you already gain kills / big level and gold advantage in early game. In late game recommended to sell Sky Piercer for a defensive Quick sell item
All the items you can use to gain advantage in teamfights. Recommend to start with Winter Crown, or Immortality if you're against Suppress(Franco, Kaja)

hero.hero_overview:
Arguably the best jungler in current meta, definitely the best jungler for solo players. Great burst, good mobility, insane map presence and can win almost any game in good hands.

Micro difficulty(baseline):  6/10
Micro difficulty(pro level):  9/10
Macro difficulty:  7.5/10
hero.hero_strength: Everything a good hero should be. Teamfight potential, splitpush potential, good retri, stun, anti-CC, map vision, can solo kill almost any hero. Unmatched snowballing and farming speed. Even the best players struggle to keep up and stress when against him.
hero.hero_weakness: Can be easily shut down early if you don't use your brain, weaker against crowded enemies and can be annoying to learn for new players.

data.recommend: Tired of losing in SoloQ? This hero can help you (and take your sanity after getting 5man invaded)

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Tigreal is one of the best teammates for YSS because his crowd control and tankiness create a safe environment for YSS to deal damage. Tigreal can lock enemies with his skills, allowing YSS to burst squishy targets without being immediately targeted. He also initiates fights and absorbs damage that would otherwise threaten YSS, making them a strong combo where Tigreal sets up kills and YSS provides the backline damage.

counters.counter_desc: Heroes that counter both YSS and Helcurt are mainly those with strong crowd control, burst damage, or tankiness.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Early Game (Jungle Phase)
Farm efficiently and avoid unnecessary fights. Focus on clearing buffs and jungle camps quickly, secure the first Turtle with Retribution, and use Ultimate to scout enemies or assist lanes.
Mid Game (Power Spike Phase)
Start joining team fights and ganks after getting core items. Target squishy heroes, use Skill 1 to reposition, and activate Ultimate to provide vision before objectives.
Late Game (Carry Phase)
Play safely and deal burst damage from the right position. Focus on enemy backliners, help secure Lord, and use Ultimate for vision and finishing low-HP enemies.

spell.spell_desc: YSS uses Retribution because he is mainly a jungler and needs fast farming to get items and levels quickly. Retribution helps him clear jungle camps faster, secure important objectives like Turtle and Lord, and gives extra utility in fights—especially Ice Retribution, which helps him chase enemies or escape since he is squishy. Without Retribution, YSS falls behind and becomes much weaker.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Floryn is compatible with Yi Sun-shin because her global healing and shield keep him alive during fights, letting him stay aggressive and continue dealing high burst damage without needing to retreat.
Her ultimate attaches to YSS, giving shields and healing while boosting his aggression in fights.
Provides movement speed and healing, helping YSS chase enemies or escape danger easily.
His crowd control combos group enemies together, letting YSS deal massive burst damage safely.
Her shield blocks projectiles, protecting YSS from burst attacks while setting up counterplays

counters.counter_desc: Chou is a perfect counter to Yi Sun-shin because his strong crowd control and mobility make it easy to catch and disable YSS before he can react.
His Iron Hook + Suppress (Ult) combo can instantly lock YSS, giving him no chance to escape or use skills.
Can one-shot YSS with his ultimate, making him a deadly assassin counter in 1v1 situations.
Uses shadows to chase and burst YSS, especially when YSS is isolated during farming or split pushing
Her invisibility and silence prevent YSS from fighting back, allowing her to ambush and kill him easily.
His bouncing ball and knockups stop YSS's dashes, making it hard for him to reposition or escape in team fights.

dominants.dominant_desc: Yi Sun-shin excels from early to late game — he farms quickly in the early stage, dominates objectives in mid game, and delivers high burst damage to finish enemies in the late game.

emblems.emblem_desc: Yi Sun-shin uses the Assassin Emblem for extra physical attack, movement speed, and penetration, helping him deal high burst damage and chase enemies more effectively.

equips.equip_desc: This build gives Yi Sun-shin high burst damage, fast farming, and enough durability to dominate both early and late game fights.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: The synergy between Yi Sun-Shin and Diggie in Mobile Legends is considered a "Good Match" primarily due to Diggie's exceptional support capabilities that complement YSS's strengths and mitigate his weaknesses. Diggie's "Time Journey" ultimate provides crucial crowd control immunity and a shield to YSS, allowing him to freely unleash his damage in team fights without being interrupted, which is vital given YSS's vulnerability to CC. Furthermore, Diggie's "Reverse Time" skill can trap or pull back enemies, setting up easy targets for YSS's burst damage and powerful basic attacks. Additionally, Diggie's "Auto Alarm Bomb" offers vision and zoning, protecting YSS during his farming phase and providing early warnings against ganks, enabling YSS to scale safely and dominate the late game.

counters.counter_desc: Yi Sun-Shin and Saber have an "Evenly Matched" counter relationship. Saber can burst down YSS if he's out of position. However, YSS can outplay Saber with good positioning, vision, defensive items like Rose Gold Meteor, and mobility skills to evade attacks. The matchup depends on player skill, items, and the situation.

dominants.dominant_desc: As a core hero, focus on efficient jungle farming to gain gold and experience quickly. Use Retribution to secure jungle buffs and objectives

emblems.emblem_desc: The Assassin emblem with the "Thrill" talent is chosen for Yi Sun-Shin to enhance his hybrid damage output, as it provides Adaptive Attack that boosts both physical and magical damage. This is particularly effective for YSS, who deals both types of damage, allowing him to secure early kills and snowball his lead by improving his ganking potential and burst damage capabilities.

equips.equip_desc: This build for Yi Sun-Shin focuses on damage and sustain, starting with Tough Boots for magic resistance and crowd control reduction. Hunter Strike provides physical attack, cooldown reduction, and movement speed after eliminating a creep or hero. War Axe adds physical attack, HP, cooldown reduction, and a stacking damage and movement speed boost in combat. Endless Battle offers a mix of stats including physical attack, mana regen, cooldown reduction, movement speed, lifesteal, and a true damage proc after using a skill. Blade of Despair significantly increases physical attack when attacking enemies with low HP. Finally, Rose Gold Meteor provides magic resistance, physical attack, and a shield when HP is low, enhancing survivability..

hero.hero_overview: YSS can switch between his sword and bow depending on the distance of his target, allowing him to have amplified attacks after each weapon switch. His skills include a dash attack that grants crowd control immunity for one second, a skill that allows him to swing his sword or shoot a powerful arrow, and his ultimate skill that summons three cannon attacks that reveal the position of enemies.
hero.hero_strength: As a Marksman/Assassin, he has both the ranged attack of a marksman and the ability to ambush and deal high damage like an assassin.
hero.hero_weakness: He needs a team with understanding to feed and protect him in the early game.

spell.spell_desc: Retribution helps YSS clear jungle camps faster, accelerating his gold and experience gain, which is crucial for a core hero

emblems.emblem_desc: YSS uses this emblem because it gives him extra sustain, mobility, and teamfight dominance—making him deadlier in both duels and extended fights.

equips.equip_desc: This item build balances damage, sustain, penetration, and mobility. It makes YSS deadly in both melee and ranged stance, letting him chase, survive, and deal consistent DPS in team fights.

Choose the Thrill for extra adaptive attack or maybe you can change for rupture for extra adaptive penetration. We need for early game to not be left behind and aggressive gameplay. 
Seasoned hunter for fast farming. Lastly, Killing Spree, I prefer this one to match my aggressive gameplay such as tower diving, 1v5.

equips.equip_desc: First, buy the fury hammer first and build the war axe after. If you feel than you are at advantage, next build is magic boot instead of tough boots. You can easily avoid all cc by optimizing your 1st skill. 3rd Item if you are still in advantage take Sky Piercer instead of hunter strike but still keep the fury hammer. Next BOD or endless battle. Lastly, Immortality, then buy and sell it when needed.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Skill ulti dari angela sangat cocok dengan Yisunshin, memberikan hp dan shield yang berguna saat war yang membuat Yisunshin sulit untuk dieleminasi serta tambahan movement speed untuk mengaktifkan pasif Yisunshin serta Mengejar musuh.

Skill 2 mathilda memudahkan rotasi Yisunshin. saat Yisunshin mencuri jungle musuh, mathilda dapat menarik Yisunshin untuk kabur dari ganking musuh. Mathilda juga sangat berguna untuk inisiasi serta membuka map karna heronya yang lincah dan sulit ditangkap

counters.counter_desc: Hayabusa memiliki kekuatan solo kill yang sangat tinggi dapat dengan mudah mengeleminasi Yisunshin dalam sekali combo. Yisunshin juga tidak memiliki skill untargetable yang membuatnya tidak bisa terlepas dan ultimate hayabusa. Tapi hal ini dapat diakali dengan membeli item Winter Crown

dominants.dominant_desc: Mengambil red buff dan mengambil creep sekitar nya dan usahakan mengambil little wanderer agar level kita diatas level musuh sehingga sapat meningkatkan damage retri kita yang dapat memudahkan kita mendapat turtle pertama.

Jika jungler musuh sudah retri saat contest dengan kita, poke poke jungler musuh agar ia recall ke bass sehingga kita dapat leluasa mencuri jungle musuh dengan cepat sehinggal gold dan level kita akan menang dari jungle musuh.
Fokus jungle dan rotasi dan usahakan setiap rotasi kita memperoleh keuntungan dari ganking tim maupun mendapat jungle musuh.

Pada saat lategame, Player harus lebih berhati hati karna damage lawan terutama marksman dan mage yang sudah besar dapat dengan mudah mengeleminasi kita. Fokus ke lord dan objective lainnya seperti turret serta manfaatkan ulti untuk melihat lokasi musuh agar tidak mudah di gank atau di pick off

Fokus mengeleminasi musuh yang sekarat atau musuh dengan HP yang tipis dan mendapat hp dan movement spd dari emblem killing spree untung membuat yisunshin mebuh awet dalan war. gunakan skill 1 untuk menghindari skill cc lawan dan mengacak acak formasi musuh sehingga mudah untuk kita eleminasi

Pastikan untuk main sabar dan aman, jaga jarak gold kita dengan lawan jangan terlalu jauh, farming tipis tipis dari creep kecil dan minion jika buff kita diambil oleh musuh serta manfaat kan ulti untuk membuka map saat ingin split push.

Disaat posisi snowball, pastikan jungler lawan tidak mendapat gold sedikit pun dengan mengambil jungle musuh dan mengeleminasi lawan sebanyak banyaknya dan fokus objective lord, turtle dan base lawan dan jangan bawa ke late game.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Emblem thrill dapat menambah adaptive attack dari Yisunshin yang membuat nya lebih sakit dan cepat dalam mengambil jungle serta mengeleminasi musuh.

Emblem Seasoned hunter sangat cocok untuk jungler seperti Yisunshin yang dapat mengclear jungle dengan cepat sehingga dapat mendominasi pertandingan serta memberikan damage tambahan ke lord dan turtle membuatnya cepat dalam mengambil objective.

Killing Spree sangat cocok dengan Yisunshin agar memperoleh Hp tambahan saat mengeleminasi musuh agar tetap awet saat war berlangsung serta menambahkan movement speed saat mengeleminasi lawan sangat berguna untuk kabur atau mengejar lawan yang sisa juga membantu Yishunshin mengaktifkan pasif untukbjarak dekat lebih mudah.

equips.equip_desc:
Ice retribution sangat berguna untuk membantu Yisunshin mengejar, melarikan diri dari musuh serta membatu mengaktifkan pasifnya.

Tough boot sangat berguna untuk menguragi waktu cc dan slow musuh serta menambah magic defense.

Hunter strike memiliki pasif menambahkan movement speed yang penting untuk Yisunshin untuk melarikan diri serta mengejar musuh, memiliki penetration dan cooldown membantu mengurangi waktu penggunaan skill serta menembus hero yang memiliki pisikal defense.

War axe sangat cocok dengan pasif Yisunshin karna saling menambahkan damage serta true damage untuk menembus tank tank yang tebal. memiliki spell vamp yang dapat membantu Yisunshin memperoleh HP serta cooldown reduction yang mempercepat penggunaal skill juga memiliki tambahan HP yang membuat ia lebih sedikit tebal.

Endless battle memberikan pasif setiap kita menggunakan skill apapun, basic attack kita akan ditambahkan damage true damage, pasif unik ini dapat membantu Yisunshin mendapat last hit dan untuk mengeburst hero yang memiliki HP tipis. Endless battle menambahkan Hp, Lifesteal dan cd reduction yang sangat dibutuhkan Yisunshin.

Malefic roar, digunakan untuk menembus pisikal defense tank dan fighter tebal. memudahkan untuk mengeleminasi mereka serta menambahkan damage ke lord dan turle.

Winter crown dapat membantu Yisunshin menghindari serangan dan damage fatal yang dapat mengeleminasi Yisunshin. item ini juga dapat digunakan untuk memancing skill yang dapat menyusahkan untuk tim kita sebelum memulai war, item ini dapat membuat penggunanya immue terhapad segala damage dan tidak bisa bergerak secara bersamaan dalam waktu yg ditentukan.

hero.hero_overview: Yisunshin memiliki kecepatan farming yang lebih cepat karna memiliki damage yang besar di early karna pasifnya membuat iya lebih dapat mendominasi pertandingan dengan cepatnya farming dapat membuatnya lebih cepat mendapatkan item dan menggendong timnya.
hero.hero_strength: Yisunshin lumayan kuat di jungle karna kecepatan farmingnya yang diatas rata rata dapat membuat ia mendapat gold dengan cepat, Ia juga asasin yang kuat dalam menculik dan menghabisi musuh serta memiliki skill immune yang membuatnya lincah serta tidak mudah ditangkap. Ultimatenya dapat membuka map sehingga memberitahu lokasi musuh musuh dan dapat dimanfaat untuk membuat gerakan saat late game. Yisunshin sangat cepat dalam mengambil lord dan objective lain nya seperti turtle dan mencuri jungle musuh.
hero.hero_weakness: Yisunshin memiliki damage yang besar saat late game, meski begitu ia akan tetap kesusahan saat war besar damage mage dan marksman lawan tentu lebih besar dan mudah untuk mengeleminasi Yisunshin. Yisunshin juga perlu ruang untuk bergerak agak bisa terus menerus mengaktifkan pasifnya untuk memaksimalkan damage yang ia berikan ke musuh.

spell.spell_desc:
Sangat cocok dengan Yisunshin yang memiliki kecepatan farming yang diatas rata rata membuat nya cepat dalam mengclear jungle jungle yang ada, pasif dari retribution juga sangat membantu mempercepat Yisunshin dalan farming.
Gunakan kombo skill 2 - Retribution untuk menge-burst Lord atau Turtle yang sekarat untuk meninggikan kemungkinan mendapat lord saat contest dengan jungler musuh.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: With Tigreal in your team the combos is unstoppable,

counters.counter_desc: It becomes hard Zhuxin in the opponent team because Zhuxin's cc makes yss to become slow and weak

dominants.dominant_desc: I recommend using yss is hard in the first because of his complicated skills but after you master him I highly recommend to use yss as your core hero since he can change the game. And also he can control map with his ultimate.. The only thing is your ms has to be good enough for his combos..

emblems.emblem_desc: This set of emblem is a true jungler power.. Farming plus damage with movements after every kills he gets.

equips.equip_desc: Aa a movements boots I prefer cool down. This set of combo gives the ultimate damage to the enemies..

hero.hero_overview: Yu Sun-Shin is a jungler hero who have a great skills including with the most powerful passive.. He can literally Dodge every hero cc if you're good with his first skill.. He have 3 skills. First one is with his blink plus passive, the second one is arrow which also make him Marksman hero.. The third is his ultimate which can finish all the low hp enemies.
hero.hero_strength: Y.S.S is over power with true damage and he also have advantages. With double power skills which make him one of the strongest assasin in the land of dawn... Yss is a true jungler who can change the game easily and can also dominate the whole game. He also have advantages farming with his double power skills which can easily helps you farm better both in the early and late..
hero.hero_weakness: Even though Yu Sun-Shin is a true over powered hero.. I finds some sort of troubles with his ultimate... His ultimate can be launch after a long amount of time.. And also the damage is low for a assasin hero

data.recommend: Learn while you're scrolling.. I know everything becomes hard in life at some point of time.. But don't ever give up or regret about your past.. The future have more opportunities and keep pushing...

spell.spell_desc:
As a assasin hero YSS is better with the retribution.. And aslo he is a mana hero so retribution is makes him more powerful.. 
 He can easily steals turtle and lords in the fights
